author: AdrianoDee
body:
#### PR description:

This PR changes the default inputs for Run4 D121 workflows. They have been produced with `20_0_0_pre1`. This allows re-enabling Run4 D121 PU workflows in 20_1_X. 

I took the chance to add the vanilla PU for the default Phase2 setup that looks to me it was missing.

#### PR validation:

Tested `34634.0`.
title: New Inputs For Run4 D121 Workflows
